Petition By Trustee For Instructions Concerning Internal Affairs Of The Trust, And For Order Authorizing And Directing Michele Larsen
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Continued To Oct-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Trustee For Instructions Concerning Internal Affairs Of The Trust, And For Order Authorizing And Directing Michele Larsen
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Continued To Oct-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Putnam for and with Christina Cortese. Edward Koplowitz for and with Michele Larsen.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to venue, the Trustees stepping down, participation in mediation, having a neutral professional appointed, etc. There was also mention of an 850 Petition in the Wife's Estate in Marin County. The Petition for Instructions was continued to October 16, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Parties to meet and discuss the matter, for the Parties to report status and for setting. If the Parties decide to participate in mediation, they can contact the Clerk and the Court can sign an order referring them to Pro Bono Mediation.


Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
